what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links an attachment identifier to a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter contains id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp.
The target is a board:// URI pointing to item-2e030ebc.
The file body is empty; there is no embedded content or description.
standouts: Uses a board:// URI scheme to reference a target board item.
Attachment type board_items suggests a cross-reference between channel memory and board items.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
References external entities via URI-style target identifiers.
notes: A sparse metadata stub that records a link from a dragnet-development channel attachment to a specific board item.
questions: What content or decision does board item item-2e030ebc represent?
What does attachment_type board_items imply about the relationship?
Why was this attachment created at the given timestamp?
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a durable, timestamped record that a board item is attached to or relevant for a channel memory entry.
novelty: The board:// URI scheme for referencing a target board item is a notable identifier convention.
contribution: Provides a lightweight, persistent metadata link between a channel attachment and a board item, enabling traceability without duplicating board content.
summary_for_embedding: A dragnet-development channel attachment metadata file referencing board item item-2e030ebc via a board:// URI.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to record an attachment relationship between a channel memory entry and a board item.
